prompt: A photorealistic vertical portrait of a young East Asian male office worker seated at a modern office desk, looking calmly and directly at the camera with a soft neutral expression. He has medium-length layered dark brown hair, slightly wet textured, parted with loose bangs, smooth pale skin, delicate facial features, and a fashionable clean appearance. He wears a oversized black blazer over a plain white T-shirt with a blue lanyard and visible employee ID badge hanging at his chest. His hands rest on the keyboard of a space gray laptop with a black Apple logo on the left side of the desk. On the desk are exactly 3 visible objects besides the laptop: a black smartphone lying face-up near the center front, a white spiral notebook on the right, and a black pen placed diagonally on the notebook. The setting is a bright glass-walled corporate office with blurred desks, windows, partitions, and cool daylight in the background, shallow depth of field, realistic reflections, muted gray-blue color palette, soft diffused lighting, high-end editorial photography style, 85mm lens look, natural skin texture, crisp focus on the face, vertical 2:3 composition, professional yet stylish atmosphere.
